description: Mailchimp via MCP: draft, test, and send campaigns; manage audiences and subscribers; pull reports.
name: io.github.cyanheads/mailchimp-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Mailchimp Marketing API key, including the '-dc' data-center suffix (e.g. 'abc...-us22'). Generate at Mailchimp → Account → Extras → API keys.
environmentVariables.name: MAILCHIMP_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (for mock servers or testing). Defaults to 'https://{dc}.api.mailchimp.com/3.0' derived from the API key suffix.
environmentVariables.name: MAILCHIMP_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Max retry attempts for transient upstream failures (0-10).
environmentVariables.name: MAILCHIMP_MAX_RETRIES

environmentVariables.description: Max in-flight upstream requests per workflow tool (1-10).
environmentVariables.name: MAILCHIMP_CONCURRENCY_LIMIT

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
